new_pir16_narrative_signals.summary: DAP QUIT the Melaka state govt over a bill allowing appointed/nominated assemblymen; 4 DAP reps moved to opposition bloc; Anwar urged postpone but was 'not briefed'; Melaka CM said 'abrupt exit shuts door on negotiations'; Perak unity govt ties unaffected.
headlines: DAP quits Melaka govt in protest of newly passed bill that allows for unelected assemblymen
Melaka DAP quits state government over nominated assemblymen Bill (Malay Mail)

Anwar says not briefed on DAP reps who quit Melaka state govt (KLSE Screener / bernama)
Anwar urges Melaka DAP to postpone decision to quit state govt (The Star)
Melaka CM: DAP reps' abrupt exit shuts door on negotiations (The Star)
DAP reps' pullout in Melaka won't affect Perak unity govt ties, says Saarani (The Star)
